name: Note Actions
author: l3ad3r1
description: Editor commands that create new notes: duplicate the note, or split its tasks into a separate note.
main:
octo.registerCommand("dup", "Duplicate as new note", function(t){ octo.notes.create("Copy of note", String(t)); return t; });
octo.registerCommand("tasks", "Send tasks to new note", function(t){ var lines = String(t).split("\n"); var tasks = []; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { if (/^\s*- \[ \]/.test(lines[i])) tasks.push(lines[i]); } if (tasks.length > 0) { octo.notes.create("Tasks", tasks.join("\n")); } return t; });
